code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn flush(_ nums: List<Int>, _ token: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(token)
    nums
  else
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      nums
    end
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        nums = flush(nums, token)
        token = ""
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  flush(nums, token)
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  for y in sorted
    if not inserted
      if x <= y
        result = list.push(result, x)
        inserted = true
      end
    end
    result = list.push(result, y)
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  for x in nums
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
  end
  sorted
end

fn format_list(_ nums: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for v in nums
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  end
  out
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let nums = parse_ints(line)
  let sorted = sort(nums)
  println(format_list(sorted))
when None
  println("")
end
